summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 final features: R27.7 (Dashboard CSV Export), R35.4 (AI Narrative Reports), R5.4 (72h Edit Window). All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/dashboard-csv returns 200 for Admin
Backend: Dashboard CSV has correct content-type (text/csv)
Backend: Dashboard CSV has attachment header with filename
Backend: Dashboard CSV contains DASHBOARD SUMMARY section with Total Clients/Services/Visits/Outcomes
Backend: Dashboard CSV contains DAILY ACTIVITY TRENDS section with date/services/visits columns
Backend: Dashboard CSV denied for Case Worker (403)
Backend: Dashboard CSV denied for Volunteer (403)
Backend: POST /api/reports/narrative endpoint exists
Backend: Narrative with empty client_ids generates narratives for ALL clients
Backend: Narrative response has correct structure (client_id, client_name, narrative, stats)
Backend: Narrative stats object has services/outcomes/visits counts
Backend: Narrative for specific client_ids works correctly
Backend: Narrative for multiple specific clients works correctly
Backend: Narrative denied for Case Worker (403)
Backend: Narrative denied for Volunteer (403)
Backend: GET /api/clients/{id}/services returns services with 'editable' boolean field
Backend: Newly created service has editable=True
Backend: Editing new service (within 72h) succeeds
Backend: Old services (>72h) have editable=False
Backend: Editing old service (past 72h) returns 403 with '72-hour' message
Backend: Case Worker can create services
Backend: Volunteer cannot create services (403)
Backend: Admin can access all report endpoints
Backend: Case Worker denied admin-only reports (403)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Export CSV' button for Admin (top right area)
Frontend: Reports page loads with AI Narrative Reports section
Frontend: Reports page has 'All Clients' checkbox
Frontend: Reports page has 'Generate Narrative Report' button
Frontend: Generate Narrative produces 36 narratives for all clients
Frontend: Narrative results show client name, stats (svc/goals/visits), and narrative text
Frontend: Client Detail Services tab shows 'Editable' badge for new services
Frontend: Client Detail Services tab shows '72h window closed' badge for old services
Frontend: Reports link NOT visible in sidebar for Case Worker
Frontend: Case Worker redirected to dashboard when accessing /reports directly
seed_data_creation: Test services created during testing: TEST_72h_Service, TEST_Edit_Service_Updated, CaseWorker_Service
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 final features fully tested and verified: 1) Dashboard CSV Export button visible for Admin only, downloads CSV with summary and daily trends, 2) AI Narrative Reports section on Reports page generates narratives for all or selected clients with client_name, stats, and narrative text, 3) Service Log 72h Edit Window shows 'Editable' badge for services within 72h and '72h window closed' badge for older services. Reports page is Admin-only (Case Worker redirected to dashboard). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_r27_r35_r5_features.py cover all endpoints.

mocked_apis_list: AI narrative uses fallback text when HF model unavailable - narratives are generated using template-based fallback
